---
title: "CV Algorithms"
subtitle: "Classical and modern algorithms built from scratch"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date asc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  include:
    categories: "{cv-algorithms}"
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time]
---

```{=html}
<div class="pp-series-hero">
  <span class="pp-series-badge badge-c">Series C</span>
  <p class="pp-series-intro">
    Edge detection, feature matching, segmentation, optical flow, object detection — the algorithms that define computer vision. Not just how to call them, but how they actually work and why they were designed that way.
  </p>
  <div class="pp-series-nav">
    <a href="index.html">← All Series</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
